blended.narrative: Hoodoo is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,471 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
